svg.title: Oesophageal Cancer, Age-Standardized Rate (World) per 100 000 of Incidence Cases, Both sexes, Worldwide in 2022

cc:Work.dc:title: Oesophageal Cancer, Age-Standardized Rate (World) per 100 000 of Incidence Cases, Both sexes, Worldwide in 2022
cc:Work.dc:description:
World map (Robinson projection) depicting oesophageal cancer incidence in both sex, age-standardized rate (world) per 100.000. Lightest blue indicates regions with a rate of 0–1, light blue indicates regions with a rate of 1–1.8, medium blue indicates regions with a rate of 1.8–2.9, dark blue indicates regions with a rate of 2.9–4.2, and darkest blue indicates regions with a rate of 4.2–17.9, grey indicates "No data / Not applicable".
Made with Flourish: https://public.flourish.studio/visualisation/17745490/
